flake

[...] kicking [...]

[...] x ša₂-niš <d>U₄.DE₃—⸢ANŠE⸣ [...]

[...] x be-let DINGIR-MEŠ lu-u₂ [...]

[...] ... lady of the gods, either [...]

flake 6'6'

[...] lu₂GUB.BA maḫ-ḫu-u₂ : LUGAL.BA.GUB.BA

[...] ⸢as⸣-sin-ni : suk-ku-ka IGI

[...] (and) hermaphrodite. : (If) he sees a deaf man

flake 10'10'

[... uq]-⸢qu⸣-qu ša₂-niš suk-ku-ku

[...] dumb, alternatively deaf
